content: laravel/framework fixture size in CI: laravel/framework is a ~200MB git clone (full history). The existing eval fixture in eval/ is a pre-cloned snapshot committed to the repo (not a live clone). Using this for integration tests means: (1) it adds ~200MB to the repo permanently — already committed in v1.1, so this cost is already paid; (2) CI checkout time: actions/checkout with full history of agentmap-php itself will pull the fixture; --filter=blob:none or shallow clone does NOT apply since fixture is in the working tree not a submodule; (3) Integration tests against the fixture should NOT re-clone laravel/framework in CI — they should reference the already-checked-out eval fixture path; (4) If integration tests run agentmap against the eval fixture dir, they need that dir to be a valid git repo — the committed fixture may not have .git history (just source files), so gitInit() may need to be called on a copy; (5) Cache the agentmap .agentmap cache dir between CI runs to avoid re-parsing 400k+ line codebase on every run.
